title: Torch Mod
description: This mod adds light to a torch when held in main hand or off hand
body:
🔦 Torch Light — Dynamic Lighting Mod
Torch Light adds immersive, dynamic lighting when holding a torch. Whether it’s in your main hand or offhand, the torch will illuminate your surroundings without needing to place it — perfect for cave exploration and survival gameplay.

✨ Features:
Works with standard torches

Light follows the player as they move

No particles, no performance hit

🆕 Added:
Dropped Torch Lighting Torches now emit light even when thrown or dropped on the ground. No more darkness when you panic-drop your last torch!

Lantern Support Standard lanterns now behave like torches — hold or drop them and they’ll light up the area dynamically.

 
This mod is ideal for players who want realism without clutter — no shaders, no gimmicks, just clean dynamic light.

💬 Join the community, share feedback, and get updates: 👉 <button type="button" data-url="discord.gg/guTwfXc4</button>" rel="noopener nofollow" target="_blank">https://discord.gg/guTwfXc4">discord.gg/guTwfXc4</button>

The Torch Light Team
